_comment: Calibration profile for CardLift_Demo_Deck.pdf, CardLift's own authored onboarding deck (see docs/ui/DEMO_DECK.md). All spatial values are in PDF POINTS (1/72 inch). Unlike solo_cards.json's hand-measured values, these were read directly from the PDF's own vector card-outline paths (PyMuPDF page.get_drawings()) and confirmed with --preview -- front cards are standard poker size (2.5in x 3.5in = 180pt x 252pt), edge-to-edge with the drawn outline, with a real 9pt gutter between cells.
_back_comment: The shared back (page 3) is centered on its own page rather than sitting at the front grid's row0,col0 position, so its geometry is overridden here; row 0, col 0 is the only card actually exported from the back page.
